text: Being here, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation. The cool, bluish glow behind the glass hints at purpose and innovation, yet the emptiness of the room fills me with solitude. In the second view, the bold declaration of 'R + D' stirs my curiosity—inviting reflection on the endless possibilities of research and development. There is a strange comfort in the silence and the promise of new knowledge. I am both an observer and a participant in an environment charged with potential.
